divider: *(Tutor plants the seed for synthesis. No student action yet. References LG2 — the One Thing — and what the student just demonstrated in EC.1. Sets up the closure stem.)*
tutor_narration: "You just wrote the same fact two ways with three different rectangles. Now let's go back to the rectangle you started with — the 4-by-5 — and say the One Thing one more time. The equal sign means both sides have the same value. That's true for every fact you write today and every fact you'll write tomorrow."
